name: Markdown Memory
description: Use Markdown files as a simple memory store, with optional per-session isolation.

memoryMode.description: Memory scope. Exactly one of 'global' or 'session' is active at a time.

storageDir.description: Base directory for Markdown memory files.

maxEntriesPerRead.description: Maximum number of memory entries returned by read tool calls.

defaultUserId.description: Optional default userId for session mode when tool params omit it.

defaultChannelId.description: Optional default channelId for session mode when tool params omit it.

defaultThreadId.description: Optional default threadId for session mode when tool params omit it (falls back to 'default').
